proceduretest

Class AStarPlugin

  • java.lang.Object
    • proceduretest.AStarPlugin

  • public class AStarPlugin
extends java.lang.Object
    Procedure Class AStarPlugin. Contains The Procedures offered by the plugin. Maintains the connection with the database.
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Nikita Maslov

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  AStarPlugin.ResultPath
      Class ResultPath defines the type of the record which will be returned by the procedure through a Java 8 stream.

      • typeTest

                                 java.lang.String property,

      • aStarPlugin

        public java.util.stream.Stream<AStarPlugin.ResultPath> aStarPlugin(long start,
                                                                   long end,
                                                                   java.lang.String costProperty,
                                                                   java.lang.String xProperty,
                                                                   java.lang.String yProperty,
                                                                   java.lang.String coordinateType,
                                                                   java.util.List<java.lang.String> relationshipTypes,
                                                                   java.util.List<java.lang.String> nodeProperties,
                                                                   java.util.List<java.lang.String> relationshipProperties,
                                                                   java.lang.String direction)
        The Procedure ExtendedAStar uses the aStar algorithm to find the shortest path between two given nodes which fulfills the given restrictions.
        Parameters:
        start - The id of the start node.
        end - The id of the end node.
        costProperty - The property which aStar will use to calculate the costs for traversing a relationship. Has to contain values which can be cast to a Double or a double because aStar is only working with double values.
        xProperty - The property which represents the x value if "XY" is used as coordinateType or the latitude if the coordinate type is "COORDINATES"(longitude latitude representation). Has to contain a value which can be cast to Double.
        yProperty - The property which represents the y value if "XY" is used as coordinateType or the longitude if the coordinate type is "COORDINATES"(longitude latitude representation). Has to contain a value which can be cast to Double.
        coordinateType - The way the nodes coordinates are represented, only "xy" and "coordinates" are accepted.
        relationshipTypes - The relationship Types which can be traversed by aStar. If the List is empty all relationship types in the database can be traversed.
        relationshipProperties - The entry's in the list can be either names of the properties(only relationships which have this property will be traversed) or expressions(only relationships which have the property and a property value that fulfills the expression will be traversed). For further details concerning the expressions read the aStarPlugin manual.
        nodeProperties - The entry's in the list can be either names of the properties(only nodes which have the property will be traversed) or expressions(only nodes which have the property and a property value that fulfills the expression will be traversed). For further details concerning the expressions read the aStarPlugin manual.
        direction - The Direction of relationships which will be traversed. Accepted values are "outgoing","incoming" and "both".
        Returns:
        The shortest Path between start and end node which fulfills the given restrictions. Empty record if no such path exists.

      • computeDistanceByXY

        public java.lang.Double computeDistanceByXY(double x1,
                                            double y1,
                                            double x2,
                                            double y2)
        Computes the distance between two points using given coordinates in form of "xy".
        Parameters:
        x1 - x of the first point
        y1 - y of the first point
        x2 - x of the second point
        y2 - y of the second point
        Returns:
        distance between two points

      • computeDistanceByCoordinates

        public java.lang.Double computeDistanceByCoordinates(double rlon1,
                                                     double rlat1,
                                                     double rlon2,
                                                     double rlat2)
        Computes the distance between two coordinates in kilometers using given coordinates in form of longitudes and latitudes.
        Parameters:
        rlon1 - first node longitude
        rlat1 - first node latitude
        rlat2 - second latitude
        rlon2 - second longitude
        Returns:
        distance between the two nodes in kilometers
